tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Nickelback
Title: Photograph
Album: All The Right Reasons
Tabber: Clayton Crowder

(I dont even know some of the names of the chords so i will mark them by [ch]E[/ch] or [ch]B[/ch] and so on)

[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
e|---0--------|---2---------|---3--------|----0--------| ( About the strumming
B|---0--------|---4---------|---3--------|----2--------|  just strum down, up,
G|---1--------|---4---------|---4--------|----2--------|  down, up one right 
D|---2--------|---4---------|---5--------|----2--------|  after the other.)
A|---2--------|---2---------|---5--------|----0--------|
E|---0--------|-------------|---3--------|-------------|[/tab]




( Now I'll just right the lyrics with the name above it and then you'll know which chord to use)
